{/* Hero */}
Smarter Event Planning

Smarter Event Hosting,
Beautiful Memories.

The all-in-one AI-powered platform that lets you create premium invitations, track real-time RSVPs, and curate exclusive memory galleries for your guests.

{/* Stats strip */}
{[ { label: 'Active Hosts', value: '12,000+' }, { label: 'Events Created', value: '48,000+' }, { label: 'Guests Managed', value: '2.4M+' }, { label: 'Satisfaction Rate', value: '99.2%' }, ].map((s, i) => (
{s.value} {s.label}

{/* Features */}
Precision Planning

Precision Planning for Every Guest

Luxury is in the details. MyGuestify AI handles the complex logistics so you can focus on the celebration.

{/* Card 1 - Digital Invitations */}

Digital Invitations

Send personalized, stunningly animated invitations via WhatsApp, Email, or SMS. Track RSVPs in real-time with our automated guest concierge.

Explore Themes →
{/* Card 2 - Elite QR Check-in */}

Elite QR Check-in

Speed up arrivals with secure QR scanning, identify VIPs instantly and ensure a seamless entry experience for every guest.

Checked in right now • Real time
{/* Card 3 - Shared AI Galleries (image bg) */}

Shared AI Galleries

Guests can instantly find their own photos using AI facial recognition. No more chasing photographers after the event.

{/* Card 4 - Master Dashboard */}

Master Dashboard

Real-time data at your fingertips. Track arrival patterns, table assignments, and dietary requirements in one command centre.

  • ✓ Live Guest Count
  • ✓ Automated RSVP Reminders
  • ✓ Vendor Management Integration
{/* Host CTA */}
Lagosian Vibrancy, Global Sophistication

Celebrate Every Moment With Style

Our platform brings together the warmth of Lagosian celebrations with world-class event management tools. Your guests deserve the very best experience.

Amara Okeke
Premium Host, Global Sophistication
{/* CTA Banner */}

Ready to host your next Real Event?

Join thousands of event professionals using MyGuestly Ai to create exceptional guest experiences.
